ligaForno.title: TURN ON THE OVEN, VÓ NANÁ IS HERE!
ligaForno.text: Good folks from Minas don’t keep secrets, right? That’s why we decided to share a bit of our traditions with everyone — warm, premium cheese bread!

items.supportText: We’re ready to help you anytime.

intro.title: WANT TO KNOW A SECRET?
intro.text: Our warm cheese bread with coffee is perfect! But did you know there are many other combinations that taste amazing with our products? We’ll share great tips so you can enjoy the flavor and versatility of our cheese bread to the fullest. From classic pairings to creative recipes, discover how to turn every bite into a unique experience. If you want to try something different and expand your horizons, we’ve selected some recipes and serving ideas for you. Get ready to be surprised and delighted!

c1.title: CHEESE BREAD + GUAVA PASTE
c1.desc: A classic and completely irresistible! Warm cheese bread paired with sweet guava paste is the perfect snack. Simple, quick, and full of flavor — ideal for any time of day.

c2.title: SMOKED CHEESE BREAD + HAM AND GRILLED CHEESE
c2.desc: A burst of flavors! Smoked cheese bread, with its bold taste, combined with ham and grilled cheese creates a unique experience. Perfect for those who want a heartier snack, ideal for a filling breakfast or a special afternoon bite.

c3.title: CHEESE BREAD + CREAM CHEESE
c3.desc: Warm cheese bread paired with smooth, creamy cheese is a perfect combination for a tasty and comforting snack. Ideal for those who love classic flavors.

historia.intro: The aroma of cheese bread filled our Sunday afternoons. We would all gather around the table to welcome a fresh batch, our eyes shining as Vó Naná brought that treat straight from the wood-fired oven.
historia.p1: Vó Naná was born with the purpose of carrying forward the legacy of the matriarch of a Minas family and her traditional cheese bread recipe made with Canastra cheese. More than a simple snack, it’s a piece of a family’s history, a symbol of Brazilian culture, and a flavor that unites generations. With every bite, we celebrate Vó Naná’s memory and connect with what truly matters: love, family, and tradition.
historia.p2: Keeping our Minas traditions alive, today we produce a premium cheese bread, preserving the original recipe and using Canastra cheese and quality ingredients, without preservatives or artificial flavorings.

whereToFind.title: WHERE TO FIND
whereToFind.text: Find Vó Naná products in the best supermarkets and specialty stores in your region. Want to bring our tradition to your business?
whereToFind.whatsappText: Hello, I would like to become a reseller of Vó Naná products.

footer.description: The true taste of Minas on your table. Tradition, quality, and lots of care in every cheese bread.
